svg.title: C3 Component diagram – Communicatiemodule
svg.desc: Internal components of the Backend Application and Notification Worker containers, with their interfaces and dependencies.
svg.text: Welke componenten zitten in de containers?

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the ConfigController component')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the FHIRPollScheduler component')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the OrganisatieService component')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the AppointmentService component')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the OrganisatieRepository component')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the MessageLogRepository component')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the RetentieJob component')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the SecurityFilter component')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the MicrometerFacade component')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the NotificationConsumer component')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the HL7Validator component')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the ProviderAdapterFactory component')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about the AckNackHandler component')
sendPrompt('How does the backend poll OpenMRS via FHIR?')
sendPrompt('What does the App Database store?')
sendPrompt('How does RabbitMQ connect the backend and worker?')
